training_status: lifts religiously, rebuilding nerve damaged atrophy muscles

benefits.description: Allows easier choice of healthy foods (fruit over cookies); reduces food noise without complete appetite suppression
Easier fat loss while maintaining muscle; progressed from 20% to 12% body fat

side_effects.description: Complete appetite suppression at 1.5mg weekly required force feeding to get protein

protocol_notes: User experimented with 1.5mg weekly but found appetite suppression too severe; reduced back to 1mg. Advocates for lower doses to support willpower and food choices rather than complete appetite suppression. Takes other substances alongside. Currently on 1mg Reta.
